value.found_quote: At the end of each turn: a background model review of everything that turn changed
value.rationale: The page describes the security-guidance plugin's end-of-turn layer, which computes a git diff of everything changed during the turn and sends it to a separate Claude review focused on security, running in the background. This directly matches the claim of a background model review of the git diff at the end of each turn. The plugin is presented as available on all plans with no deprecation notice.
